programme.title: Monster Jam S3
programme.desc: Returning season. Professional monster truck drivers compete against each other in races and freestyle competitions around the world to win the top prize.

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption S3
programme.desc: Parker decides to take down a local factory kingpin using child labor. While the villain spins his own version of how he was wrongfully destroyed, the team tries to unravel the con Parker's running as a solo side job or is she? The team must play catch up as they find themselves drafted into her machinations.

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Films & Stars
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Planet Action S4
programme.desc: Planet Action takes you behind the scenes of the best action movies released. Each episode you'll get all the secrets straight from your favorite action heroes, get exclusive trivia and special reports from the most dangerous film sets, and get insight information on how the filmmakers make giant monsters come to life. This show is a sci-fi, cowboy, world-destruction, action-combo that will literally blow your mind!

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather S6
programme.desc: Nature is a tempestuous beast, capable of destruction on a level so devastating and claimed the lives of millions. In recent years, these extreme weather events have become more and more commonplace.

programme.title: Lingo USA S1
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: The Contenders 26
programme.desc: England are being reshaped by Thomas Tuchel, Amad Diallo is a rising star for the Ivory Coast, and the U20 World Cup bodes well for Morocco's future.

programme.title: Mat Yoyo S3
programme.desc: Mat Yoyo - The New Generation is an educational program in its third season and continues to provide children with wholesome family edu-tainment and fun.

programme.title: Hoppy & Friends
programme.desc: Hoppy and Friends is a Pre-school series featuring Hoppy, the Rabbit, Leo the Lion and Panny the Panda. Every episode, they embark on an adventure through stories. Join them on a fantastic journey and explore the wonderful world around them through song, dance.

programme.title: The Big Q S4
programme.desc: The Big Q S4.

programme.title: Hobby TV S2
programme.desc: From playing with skateboards to collecting stamps from building models to drawing comics, hosts Randall and Gus show kids the ins n outs of hobbies – the wacky way!

programme.title: Tayo the Little Bus 3
programme.desc: The adventures of Tayo, a blue bus with the number 120. He is very playful and mischievous with his passengers and his friends.

programme.title: Tayo the Little Bus 3
programme.desc: The adventures of Tayo, a blue bus with the number 120. He is very playful and mischievous with his passengers and his friends.

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs & Stories
programme.desc: Sing and learn with Pinkfong and Baby Shark's collection of songs and stories!

programme.title: Slimed Science
programme.desc: Making salad is all about timing! Dr Slime is cutting up some fruits for his fruit salad, but before he knows it, some of his fruits have browned? What can he do to prevent browning and keep his fruits fresh for the salad?

programme.title: Slimed Science
programme.desc: It is Mother's Day! Dr Slime wants to make some unique gifts for his mother. How can he make his own special bouquet, a perfume, and a snow globe with regular household items?

programme.title: The Woohoos!
programme.desc: Join Wynona the puffin, Iggy the wolfhound, Scotty the highland bull and Ellie the hare as they wonder at the natural world all around them on Wise Island. Each episode brings an exciting "Ooo" moment, a new discovery that needs explaining, and when they find the answer what do they say? "WOOHOO!".

programme.title: Pfffirates
programme.desc: On Calypso Island, three crews are taught Pfffiracy by the legendary Captain Lamar. This tough training program ranges from sailing exercises and treasure hunting competitions to cannon firing and accosting enemy ships! But it would take more than that for Pat, Lily or Stede to give up. When a Pfffirate has friends to count on, nothing is impossible!

programme.title: Leo the Wildlife Ranger S7 Spinoff
programme.desc: In a Chinese forest, Kai tries to find animal sounds but is sidetracked by a buzzing cicada, leading Leo, Katie, and Hero on a mission to help the lonely insect find a mate, resulting in a chaotic attempt to amplify the cicada's buzz.

programme.title: Leo the Wildlife Ranger S7 Spinoff
programme.desc: In the African shrublands, the Junior Rangers is with an Aardvark that is unsually awake during the day, prompting a mission for the rangers as they figure out why it won't go into its burrow.

programme.title: Jade Armor S2
programme.desc: Join Lan Jun, the unlikely Chinese teen hero who inherits a magical suit of armor, and her Beasticon talking animal friends, as they continue to defend their city of Ban Tang, against the Crimson Lord and Black Tiger!

programme.title: Dragons: Riders Of Berk S1
programme.desc: The Vikings of Berk must learn to live alongside dragons. Hiccup and his friends establish the Dragon Academy to train dragons and defend the island from new enemies, primarily the Outcast Tribe led by Alvin the Treacherous.

programme.title: Metal Cardbot S1
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Mandarin) (Dual Language English and Chinese) A long time ago, there was a planet named Machina where a race of sentient machines, or Metal Cardbots, resided. One day, the planet suddenly explodes, forcing its inhabitants to live on Earth. To not attract attention, the Cardbots disguise themselves as everyday vehicles.

programme.title: Metal Cardbot S1
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Mandarin) (Dual Language English and Chinese) A long time ago, there was a planet named Machina where a race of sentient machines, or Metal Cardbots, resided. programme.title: Grizzy & The Lemmings S4
programme.desc: The hilarious misadventures of Grizzy and the Lemmings continue... now in unexpected places around the world!

programme.title: Grizzy & The Lemmings S4
programme.desc: The hilarious misadventures of Grizzy and the Lemmings continue... now in unexpected places around the world!

programme.title: Grizzy & The Lemmings S4

programme.title: Zak & Wowo: The Legend of Lendarys
programme.desc: Thirteen year old Zak goes in search of his twin brother Kyle, who has disappeared mysteriously. Equipped with a magical jade stone whose superpowers he doesn't yet know how to control, he is joined by his grandmother NaiNai, Indiana, a beautiful outlaw who can communicate with fantastical creatures, and Wowo, formerly a 3 meter-tall furry pachyderm, now turned into a tiny, cute and wacky furball by the magical jade stone.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Zachary suggests that Raffles takes everyone camping this weekend, mostly to give Zachary a break from them all. Unfortunately, both Raffles and Leonardo develop a toothache. They take an all-purpose Zetabian pain-killer, only to start turning blue literally. Raffles and Leonardo return to the apartment to discover that Neela has turned the living room into a camp-in.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: The "campers" wake next morning to find they still have toothache... but that Neela has disappeared. Zachary and Raffles know she won't last a minute out in nature. They have to find her! After an unsuccessful search, Neela turns up again, having spent the night in comfort on the ship. She also has a device to help with the toothache..

programme.title: The Contenders 26
programme.desc: Spain will enter the World Cup as favourites, Granit Xhaka is enjoying a renaissance with Switzerland, and we check out the latest World Cup stickers.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Remarkable Places To Eat S3
programme.desc: Leading chefs take host Fred Sirieix to experience the restaurants where they genuinely love to eat and explore what goes into making them so special.

programme.title: Password US S1
programme.desc: Contestants from all walks of life are partnered with Jimmy Fallon and other guest celebrities to face off in the ultimate game of words, competing to win up to 25,000 by guessing a secret password from only single-word clues.

programme.title: Thor: Love and Thunder
programme.desc: Thor enlists the help of Valkyrie, Korg and ex-girlfriend Jane Foster to fight Gorr the God Butcher, who intends to make the gods extinct.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A young Albertosaurus, a relative of T-Rex, earns her place in a ferocious hunting pack.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Day Express
programme.desc: Match Day Express brings you the goals, the plays, and the heroes of all 104 matches of the FIFA World Cup 2026!

programme.title: Secret in Their Eyes
programme.desc: A tight-knit team of rising investigators, along with their supervisor, is suddenly torn apart when they discover that one of their own teenage daughters has been brutally murdered.

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programme.desc: The series stars two new protagonists, Liko and Roy, who team up with the Rising Volt Tacklers, a group of adventurers that explore the Pokmon world and visit various regions. As they do, they are pursued by the Explorers, a mysterious organization seeking Liko's pendant for unknown reasons.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: On The Red Dot offers weekly in-depth analysis and discussion on key issues and events that matter to Singaporeans.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: With a fresh approach to tackling the issues of the day, Talking Point investigates a current issue or event, offering different perspectives to local stories and reveals how it all affects you.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: Derek and James find themselves at the centre of a social media firestorm after a confrontation. Ah Yoke is still convinced that Yang is posing as Dr Shen to mess with their wedding plans. Matthew makes a shocking discovery after he gets an anonymous phone call.

programme.title: The Contenders 26
programme.desc: Croatia are recent World Cup specialists, Moises Caicedo is living up to his huge price tag, and we analyse the Group Stage draw.

programme.desc: Combining two of the world's greatest passions, Ainsley's Football Feasts stars Britain's favourite TV chef as he serves up mouth-watering food for any sport event.

programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: Veggie Island
programme.desc: This program introduces vegetarian restaurants from all across Taiwan. Featured restaurants include fine dining restaurants, casual dining, all-you-can-eat buffets, dim sum, international fusion cuisine, Buddhist temple food, dessert shops, and vegetarian food workshops.

programme.title: John Torode's Asia
programme.desc: John Torode's journey around Asia has been full of colour, awe inspiring vistas and of course it's been a celebration of the diverse cuisine available all over the continent. In this episode of John Torode's Asia we take a look back at a series full of tantalising tastes, remind ourselves of the best of the chefs and we re-live the moments that brought a tear to his eye: whether they've been prompted by chillies in China or monks in Bangkok.
